NotFound.description: But don't worry, how about checking out my <blog>blog</blog> or taking a look at my <projects>projects</projects>?

IndexPage.about: I’ve been working as a Web Developer since 2021 and I’m currently a Front-End Developer at Petlove.

contributions.1: Developed critical features for the e-commerce platform, increasing conversion and customer satisfaction.
contributions.2: Optimized the CI/CD pipeline by parallelizing test execution and code analysis (Sonar), reducing build/deploy time from ~1h to ~12 minutes (~80% reduction) and eliminating bottlenecks in the delivery process.
contributions.3: Contributed to Nuxt.js by reporting and documenting an issue, helping identify a problem in the build of version 3.16.0+ and discussing the solution (https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt/issues/32494).
contributions.4: Contributed to Unleash (JS SDK) with a Pull Request, improving the library and collaborating with the project's core. The change was made to provide benefits in our use of Unleash in our applications (https://l1nq.com/unleash-pr).
contributions.5: Resolved a security issue in application redirection, preventing user cookies/cache from being compromised by external links.
contributions.6: Resolved an XSS issue in a web component, preventing HTML Injection from being applied through the component's fields (https://sl1nk.com/atomium).
contributions.7: Worked on component development in the Atomium Design System (open-source), resulting in a 40% reduction in new feature development time. Prioritizing demands, developing components, resolving issues, and reviewing PRs. Contributions: https://shre.ink/Mliv.
contributions.8: Redesigned the front-end engineering team's documentation process, with the intention of creating and centralizing ADRs and various documentation.
contributions.9: Created and documented front-end security solutions, reducing critical vulnerabilities by 100% and establishing security standards for the team.
contributions.10: Developed technical POCs to evaluate the feasibility of new features, including animation implementation, guiding architectural decisions.
contributions.11: Reduced technical debt through refactoring, optimizations, and performance improvements.
contributions.12: Collaborated with product, UI/UX, and engineering to align technical solutions with business objectives.
contributions.13: Contributed to reducing technical debt through refactoring, optimizations, security fixes, and performance improvements, such as handling chunk errors.
contributions.14: Contributed to improving the squad's workflow both individually and collectively.
contributions.15: Participated in meetings and events focused on front-end and other broad topics, connecting with professionals who have enhanced my technical and interpersonal development.

contributions.1: Led the frontend development of an MVP SaaS for cloud backup targeting MSPs and regulated industries.
contributions.2: Designed and implemented the UI/UX, creating scalable layouts, user flows, and a design system (colors, typography, spacing, component patterns) in Figma.
contributions.3: Defined frontend architecture decisions, documenting technical choices and establishing standards.
contributions.4: Collaborated with stakeholders to define and refine business rules and product flows.
contributions.5: Integrated the frontend with cloud APIs, including user management, authentication flows, and core CRUD operations.
contributions.6: Ensured consistency between product requirements, UX decisions, and technical implementation.

contributions.1: Created articles on React Design Patterns concepts such as Compound Components, Error Boundaries, etc.
contributions.2: Improved the project through architecture management and organization.
contributions.3: Reviewed and merged pull requests, provided suggestions, and answered questions.

contributions.1: Front-end development contributions to a website project that was paused.
contributions.2: Participation and contributions to project improvements.
contributions.3: Attended meetings to improve communication and help steer project development with the team.
contributions.4: Opportunity to work with a dedicated and welcoming team, where I had space to learn new technologies from scratch.
contributions.5: Main technologies used: JavaScript ES6+, Next.js, React.js, Chakra UI, Git, and GitHub.

BlogPage.contribution: Liked the content? I accept a contribution! :)
BlogPage.addSomethingDescription: This blog is open source, so feel free to open a PR in the repository.
